Newcastle and Nottingham Forest in for same player – Magpies could have edge over Nuno’s side
arts.sum: Newcastle United and Nottingham Forest have taken notice of Nuno Tavares’s rise at Lazio this season. That’s at least what La Lazio Siamo Noi are reporting, and they name Newcastle and Nottingham Forest as the left-back’s interest parties. The left-back made 26 appearances this season and registered nine assists in the process. arts.ttl: Aston Villa defender has 'good feeling' amid transfer clause
arts.sum: Aston Villa defender Kosta Nedeljkovic is enjoying himself at loan club RB Leipzig, as the Bundesliga side weigh up whether to trigger the option to sign the right-back on a permanent basis come the summer transfer window. Nedeljkovic only agreed to move to Villa from boyhood club Red Star Belgrade in his native Serbia a little over a year ago; scouted and deemed a suitable profile, Villa signed him in the January transfer window but allowed him to remain at Red Star on loan until last summer.
